calendar.matters:
Petition To Finds That Assets Are Property Of Trust Under Probate Code 17200(B)(4),850(A)(3) & 856
Off Calendar Jul-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maureen S. McFadden, for Petitioner Noreen Curtin.
The Court asked if there was any additional argument regarding the Schwab account and notice. Ms. McFadden responded that she had spoken with the two sisters of the decedent, and that they had no problem with the Schwab accounts being included as assets of the trust. She stated that the sisters were the decedent's only heirs, and that they informed her they wiaved and further notice. The Court waived further notice, and took the Petition to Find That Assets are Property of Trust under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
